title: chelidonium japonicum f. lanceolatum
intro: Chelidonium japonicum f. lanceolatum, also known as the Japanese celandine, is a variety of the Chelidonium majus plant, a flowering perennial native to East Asia, characterized by its lance-shaped leaves and bright yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Chelidonium japonicum f. lanceolatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
